name: Alu Bagan
recipeIngredient: 2 large Tomatoes, chopped, or 1 (16-ounce) can chopped tomatoes with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or electric frying pan, heat olive oil and sauté onions and garlic until onions are golden.
2. Add potatoes, eggplant, and mushrooms to the pan and cook over medium-high heat for ten minutes.
3. Stir in tomatoes (fresh or from can with juice) and all spices, along with 1 cup of water. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are cooked through, about 30 to 40 minutes. Add more water or oil as needed as it evaporates.
4. Serve hot over warmed whole wheat tortillas. For a burrito-style serving, spread the tortilla with butter before adding the vegetables.
